subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: Hell signifies punishment and the Kingdom signifies reward.... Heaven and Hell have been misunderstood until the Blessed Perfection explained the true meaning
subcodes.subjects: @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @chastisement and requital, @soul; spirit after death, @knowledge; recognition of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
